# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive \
    PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK=1 \
    PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1

SHELL ["/bin/bash", "-o", "pipefail", "-c"]

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    tzdata \
    locales \
    apt-transport-https \
    software-properties-common \
    build-essential \
    gcc \
    g++ \
    make \
    pkg-config \
    cmake \
    autoconf \
    automake \
    libtool \
    gdb \
    strace \
    ltrace \
    procps \
    psmisc \
    htop \
    nano \
    vim \
    less \
    jq \
    tree \
    unzip \
    zip \
    xz-utils \
    bzip2 \
    gnupg \
    openssh-client \
    rsync \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    bash-completion \
    iproute2 \
    iputils-ping \
    dnsutils \
    net-tools \
    tcpdump \
    netcat-openbsd \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    python3-venv \
    python3-dev \
    && ln -sf /usr/bin/python3 /usr/local/bin/python \
    && python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel \
    && locale-gen en_US.UTF-8 \
    && update-ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV LANG=en_US.UTF-8 \
    LANGUAGE=en_US:en \
    LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8

WORKDIR /app

COPY requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN if [[ -f /app/requirements.txt ]]; then python -m pip install -r /app/requirements.txt; fi

COPY . /app

CMD ["python", "-m", "app"]
